title: Jack Henry Executives to Present at Upcoming Investor Conferences
text: MONETT, Mo. , Aug. 30, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Jack Henry & Associates, Inc.® (Nasdaq: JKHY) announced today that it will be participating in the upcoming conferences: David Foss, Board Chair & CEO, will present at the Goldman Sachs Communacopia + Technology Conference on September 6 th.

title: JACK HENRY & ASSOCIATES ANNOUNCES REGULAR QUARTERLY DIVIDEND
text: MONETT, Mo. , Aug. 21, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Jack Henry & Associates, Inc. (NASDAQ: JKHY) today announced its Board of Directors declared a regular quarterly cash dividend of $.52 per share.

title: Jack Henry & Associates, Inc. (JKHY) Q4 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Jack Henry & Associates, Inc. title: Jack Henry (JKHY) Q4 Earnings Beat Estimates, Revenues Rise Y/Y
text: Jack Henry's (JKHY) fourth-quarter fiscal 2023 results benefit from strength across the Core, Complementary, Payments and Corporate segments.

title: Why Jack Henry Stock Was Down Today
text: The company posted an 11% year-over-year increase in revenue last quarter. It was the strongest quarter for sales bookings in its history.

title: Jack Henry (JKHY) Reports Q4 Earnings: What Key Metrics Have to Say
text: Although the revenue and EPS for Jack Henry (JKHY) give a sense of how its business performed in the quarter ended June 2023, it might be worth considering how some key metrics compare with Wall Street estimates and the year-ago numbers.

title: Jack Henry (JKHY) Tops Q4 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Jack Henry (JKHY) came out with quarterly earnings of $1.34 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $1.19 per share. This compares to earnings of $1.10 per share a year ago.

title: Jack Henry & Associates shares struggle after thin fiscal '24 margin guidance
text: Jack Henry & Associates Inc shares dipped after hours Tuesday despite results that beat Wall Street expectations.  The payment processing company posted fourth-quarter net income of $97.8 million, $1.34 per share, topping projections of $1.19 per share.

title: Jack Henry & Associates, Inc. Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year Fiscal 2023 Results
text: Fiscal year summary: GAAP revenue increased 7% and GAAP operating income increased 1% for the fiscal year ended June 30, 2023, compared to the prior fiscal year. Non-GAAP adjusted revenue increased 8% and non-GAAP adjusted operating income increased 8% for the fiscal year ended June 30, 2023, compared to the prior fiscal year.1 GAAP EPS was $5.02 per diluted share for the fiscal year ended June 30, 2023, compared to $4.94 in the prior fiscal year.

title: What's in the Offing for Jack Henry's (JKHY) Q4 Earnings?
text: Jack Henry's (JKHY) fiscal fourth-quarter results are expected to reflect strength across the Core, Payments, Complementary and Corporate segments.

title: JACK HENRY & ASSOCIATES TO PROVIDE WEBCAST OF FOURTH QUARTER & FISCAL YEAR-END 2023 EARNINGS CALL
text: MONETT, Mo. , Aug. 2, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Jack Henry & Associates, Inc.® (NASDAQ: JKHY) announced today that it will host a live Webcast of its fourth quarter and fiscal year end 2023 earnings conference call on August 16, 2023.

title: Looking for a Bargain? 3 Fintech Stocks to Buy That Are Down 3% in 2023
text: In 2020 and 2021, the markets were buzzing with talk about the disruption threat fintechs posed to traditional financial institutions like banks. But, as soon as the Federal Reserve (Fed) began rate hikes, reality set in.
